SELECT 
    eventdate,
    userid,
    traffic,
    location
FROM (
    SELECT 
        TRUNC(EVENTDATE, 'IW') AS eventdate,
        USERID,
        SUM(TRAFFIC) AS traffic,
        location,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY TRUNC(EVENTDATE, 'IW'), USERID 
            ORDER BY location_count DESC, location
        ) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            EVENTDATE,
            USERID,
            TRAFFIC,
            LOCATION,
            COUNT(*) OVER (
                PARTITION BY TRUNC(EVENTDATE, 'IW'), USERID, LOCATION
            ) AS location_count
        FROM SCHOOL_EVENTS
    )
    GROUP BY TRUNC(EVENTDATE, 'IW'), USERID, LOCATION, location_count
)
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY eventdate, userid

UPDATE record r
SET (r1, r2) = (SELECT sys_guid(), sys_guid() FROM dual WHERE rownum = 1)

INSERT INTO GROUPS (ROOM_GUID, USER_GUID)
SELECT DISTINCT 
    l1.GUID as ROOM_GUID,
    g.USER_GUID
FROM LOGIN l1
JOIN LOGIN l2 ON l1.LOGIN = l2.LOGIN AND l1.NAME = l2.NAME AND l1.GUID != l2.GUID
JOIN GROUPS g ON g.ROOM_GUID = l2.GUID
WHERE l1.GUID NOT IN (SELECT ROOM_GUID FROM GROUPS)
AND (l1.LOGIN, l1.NAME) IN (
    SELECT LOGIN, NAME 
    FROM LOGIN 
    GROUP BY LOGIN, NAME 
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)

WITH all_years AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TRANSACT_DT_TM) AS year
    FROM BOND_LIST
    WHERE TRANSACT_DT_TM IS NOT NULL
),
year_bond_cross AS (
    SELECT 
        y.year,
        br.BOND_TYPE,
        br.BOND_SEQ
    FROM all_years y
    CROSS JOIN BOND_REF br
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl.TRANSACT_DT_TM) AS year,
        bl.BOND_TYPE,
        COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM BOND_LIST bl
    WHERE bl.TRANSACT_DT_TM IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl.TRANSACT_DT_TM), bl.BOND_TYPE
)
SELECT 
    ybc.year,
    ybc.BOND_TYPE,
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS bond_count,
    ybc.BOND_SEQ
FROM year_bond_cross ybc
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc 
    ON ybc.year = bc.year 
    AND ybc.BOND_TYPE = bc.BOND_TYPE
ORDER BY ybc.year, ybc.BOND_SEQ

WITH flagged AS (
    SELECT 
        id, 
        enroll_date, 
        total_employees,
        CASE WHEN total_employees > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS emp_flag,
        id - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS grp_all
    FROM EMPLOYEE
),
consecutive_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        enroll_date,
        total_employees,
        emp_flag,
        id - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS grp
    FROM flagged
    WHERE emp_flag = 1
),
group_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        grp,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM consecutive_groups
    GROUP BY grp
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
SELECT 
    cg.id,
    cg.enroll_date,
    cg.total_employees
FROM consecutive_groups cg
INNER JOIN group_counts gc ON cg.grp = gc.grp
ORDER BY cg.id

SELECT 
    SUM("2020") as total_2020,
    SUM("2021") as total_2021,
    SUM("2022") as total_2022,
    SUM("2023") as total_2023,
    SUM("2024") as total_2024,
    SUM(NVL("2020",0) + NVL("2021",0) + NVL("2022",0) + NVL("2023",0) + NVL("2024",0)) as grand_total
FROM (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM PAYMENT_DATE) as "year",
        PAYMENT_SUM
    FROM FEE
) 
PIVOT (
    SUM(PAYMENT_SUM) 
    FOR "year" IN (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024)
)

SELECT ORA_HASH(PRODUCT_ID) AS hash_value, 
       LENGTH(TO_CHAR(ORA_HASH(PRODUCT_ID))) AS hash_length 
FROM PRODUCTS

SELECT "Match"."id" AS "match_id",
       "Match"."date" AS "match_date",
       "Match"."home_team_goal" AS "home_team_goals",
       "Match"."away_team_goal" AS "away_team_goals",
       "HomeTeam"."team_long_name" AS "home_team_name",
       "AwayTeam"."team_long_name" AS "away_team_name",
       "League"."name" AS "league_name"
FROM "Match"
INNER JOIN "Team" "HomeTeam" ON "Match"."home_team_api_id" = "HomeTeam"."team_api_id"
INNER JOIN "Team" "AwayTeam" ON "Match"."away_team_api_id" = "AwayTeam"."team_api_id"
INNER JOIN "League" ON "Match"."league_id" = "League"."id"
ORDER BY "Match"."date"

WITH atom_hierarchy (atom_id, atom_id2, bond_id, level, path) AS
  (SELECT atom_id,
          atom_id2,
          bond_id,
          1 AS level,
          '/' || atom_id || '/' AS path
   FROM connected
   WHERE atom_id = 'TR007_8'
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT c.atom_id,
          c.atom_id2,
          c.bond_id,
          ah.level + 1,
          ah.path || c.atom_id || '/'
   FROM connected c
   JOIN atom_hierarchy ah ON c.atom_id = ah.atom_id2
   WHERE ah.level < 10
     AND ah.path NOT LIKE '%/' || c.atom_id || '/%')
SELECT atom_id,
       atom_id2,
       bond_id,
       level
FROM atom_hierarchy
ORDER BY level, atom_id

SELECT XMLSERIALIZE(DOCUMENT XMLELEMENT("files", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("file", XMLFOREST("id" AS "id", "team_long_name" AS "team_long_name"))
                                                        ORDER BY NLSSORT("team_long_name", 'NLS_SORT=XFRENCH'))) INDENT SIZE = 2)
FROM "Team"
WHERE "team_api_id" IN
    (SELECT "team_api_id"
     FROM "Team_Attributes"
     WHERE "date" IS NULL)

WITH match_years AS (
    SELECT
        M."league_id",
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M."date") AS match_year,
        COUNT(*) AS year_count
    FROM "Match" M
    WHERE M."date" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY M."league_id", EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M."date")
),
league_stats AS (
    SELECT
        L."id" AS league_id,
        L."name" AS league_name,
        C."name" AS country_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT M."id") AS total_matches
    FROM "League" L
    JOIN "Country" C ON L."country_id" = C."id"
    LEFT JOIN "Match" M ON L."id" = M."league_id"
    GROUP BY L."id", L."name", C."name"
)
SELECT
    ls.league_name,
    my.match_year AS "year",
    my.year_count AS "match_count",
    ROUND(my.year_count / NULLIF(ls.total_matches, 0) * 100, 2) AS percentage_of_total
FROM match_years my
JOIN league_stats ls ON my."league_id" = ls.league_id
WHERE my.match_year BETWEEN 2008 AND 2016
ORDER BY
    my.match_year,
    ls.league_name

WITH temp AS
  (SELECT a."atom_id",
          a."molecule_id",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id"
                             ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."atom_id", '\d+$'))) - TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."atom_id", '\d+$')) AS grp
   FROM "atom" a), temp2 AS
  (SELECT t."atom_id",
          t."molecule_id",
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t."molecule_id", t.grp) AS cnt
   FROM temp t)
SELECT t2."atom_id",
       t2."molecule_id"
FROM temp2 t2
WHERE t2.cnt >= 3
ORDER BY t2."molecule_id",
         t2."atom_id"

SELECT
    school_id,
    MIN(start_date) AS period_start,
    MAX(end_date) AS period_end
FROM (
    SELECT
        school_id,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        SUM(new_group) OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY start_date, end_date) AS grp
    FROM (
        SELECT
            school_id,
            start_date,
            end_date,
            CASE
                WHEN start_date <= NVL(LAG(end_date) OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY start_date, end_date), start_date - 1) + 1
                THEN 0
                ELSE 1
            END AS new_group
        FROM SCHOOL_INFO
    )
)
GROUP BY school_id, grp
ORDER BY school_id, period_start

WITH "MaxHeightCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        "alignment_id",
        "publisher_id",
        MAX("height_cm") AS "max_height"
    FROM "superhero"
    GROUP BY "alignment_id", "publisher_id"
)
SELECT
    s."id",
    s."superhero_name",
    s."alignment_id",
    s."publisher_id",
    s."height_cm",
    s."hair_colour_id",
    SUM(s."hair_colour_id") OVER (PARTITION BY s."alignment_id", s."publisher_id") AS "total_hair_colour"
FROM "superhero" s
JOIN "MaxHeightCTE" m
   ON s."alignment_id" = m."alignment_id"
  AND s."publisher_id" = m."publisher_id"
  AND s."height_cm"    = m."max_height"
ORDER BY
    s."alignment_id",
    s."publisher_id",
    s."id"

WITH map AS (
    SELECT
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT(from_atom) AS begin_atom,
        to_atom                    AS end_atom,
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT(start_date) AS path_start_date,
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT(end_date) AS path_end_date,
        LEVEL
    FROM toxic_mappings
    WHERE CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF = 1
    CONNECT BY NOCYCLE from_atom = PRIOR to_atom
)
SELECT
    begin_atom,
    end_atom,
    path_start_date,
    path_end_date AS end_date
FROM map
ORDER BY begin_atom, path_start_date

SELECT DISTINCT
    a."atom_id",
    a."molecule_id",
    a."element",
    m."label",
    c."bond_id",
    b."bond_type"
FROM "atom" a
LEFT JOIN "molecule" m ON a."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
WHERE a."atom_id" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a."molecule_id", a."atom_id"

WITH
set_a (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT element)
        FROM atom
        GROUP BY molecule_id
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT element) > 1
    ),
    set_b (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.element)
        FROM molecule m
        JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        WHERE m.label IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY m.molecule_id
    ),
unique_a (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_a
    ),
    unique_b (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_b
    ),
molecule_hierarchy AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            CONNECT_BY_ROOT molecule_id AS root_molecule,
            LEVEL AS hierarchy_level
        FROM molecule
        CONNECT BY PRIOR molecule_id = molecule_id
        START WITH label = '+'
    )
SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.rn = b.rn AND a.density_rank = b.density_rank THEN 1 END) AS num_identical_in_a_and_b,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_a,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_b,
    LISTAGG(a.molecule_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.density_rank) AS matching_molecules,
    JSON_ARRAYAGG(
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule' VALUE a.molecule_id,
            'rank' VALUE a.density_rank
        )
        ORDER BY b.density_rank
    ) AS molecule_json
FROM unique_a a
FULL OUTER JOIN unique_b b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND a.rn = b.rn
LEFT JOIN molecule_hierarchy h ON a.molecule_id = h.molecule_id
WHERE
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM bond
        WHERE bond.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        AND bond.bond_id = 'TR011_2_24'
    )
AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM connected c
        JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
        JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        WHERE a1.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        AND a1.element = a2.element
    )
GROUP BY
    GROUPING SETS (
        (a.density_rank, b.density_rank),
        ()
    )
HAVING
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.molecule_id) > (
        SELECT AVG(element_count)
        FROM set_a
    )

SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id", "element"
FROM "atom"
WHERE "element" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "molecule_id", "element"

SELECT "molecule_id",
       LISTAGG(DISTINCT "atom_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "atom_id") AS "atom_ids"
FROM "atom"
WHERE "molecule_id" = 'TR011'
GROUP BY "molecule_id"

WITH "data" ("value") AS
  (SELECT '111,2,3 | 112,4,5 | 113,6,7'
   FROM dual),
     "hero_attributes" ("value",
                        "i",
                        "max_i",
                        "hero_id",
                        "attribute_id",
                        "attribute_value") AS
  (SELECT "value",
          1,
          REGEXP_COUNT("value", '\|') + 1,
          TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,]+),([^,]+),([^|]+)', 1, 1, NULL, 1)),
          TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,]+),([^,]+),([^|]+)', 1, 1, NULL, 2)),
          TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,]+),([^,]+),([^|]+)', 1, 1, NULL, 3))
   FROM "data"
   UNION ALL SELECT "value",
                    "i" + 1,
                    "max_i",
                    TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,]+),([^,]+),([^|]+)', 1, "i" + 1, NULL, 1)),
                    TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,]+),([^,]+),([^|]+)', 1, "i" + 1, NULL, 2)),
                    TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '([^,]+),([^,]+),([^|]+)', 1, "i" + 1, NULL, 3))
   FROM "hero_attributes"
   WHERE "i" < "max_i")
SELECT "i",
       "hero_id",
       "attribute_id",
       "attribute_value"
FROM "hero_attributes"
WHERE "hero_id" IS NOT NULL

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT
        "date",
        "match_api_id",
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM CAST("date" AS TIMESTAMP)) +
        EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM CAST("date" AS TIMESTAMP))/60 AS hour_of_day,
        TRUNC("date") AS match_date
    FROM "Match"
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT
        mt."date",
        mt."match_api_id",
        mt.match_date,
        tt.target_hour,
        CASE
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 8 THEN 'morning'
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 20 THEN 'evening'
        END AS time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date, tt.target_hour
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour)
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times mt
    CROSS JOIN target_times tt
)
SELECT
    dc.match_date + (dc.target_hour/24) AS target_datetime,
    dc."date",
    dc."match_api_id",
    dc.time_period,
    dc.time_distance,
    (dc."date" - dc.match_date) * 24 AS actual_hours,
    RANK() OVER (
        PARTITION BY dc.match_date, dc.time_period
        ORDER BY dc.time_distance, dc."match_api_id"
    ) AS final_rank
FROM distance_calc dc
WHERE dc.time_rank <= 1
  AND dc.time_distance <=
      CASE
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 8 THEN 4
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 20 THEN 3
      END
ORDER BY
    dc.match_date,
    dc.target_hour,
    dc.time_distance

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        COUNT(*) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        bond_id,
        molecule_id,
        bond_type,
        LEVEL AS bond_depth,
        SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(bond_id, '/') AS bond_path
    FROM bond
    START WITH bond_id LIKE '%\_2\_%' ESCAPE '\'
    CONNECT BY PRIOR bond_id = bond_id AND ROWNUM <= 1
),
molecule_json AS (
    SELECT 
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule_id' VALUE m.molecule_id,
            'label' VALUE m.label,
            'atoms' VALUE (
                SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                    JSON_OBJECT(
                        'atom_id' VALUE a.atom_id,
                        'element' VALUE a.element
                    )
                    ORDER BY a.atom_id
                )
                FROM atom a
                WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
            )
        ) AS molecule_data
    FROM molecule m
)
SELECT 
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    c.atom_id2,
    stats.atom_count,
    stats.elements,
    CASE 
        WHEN JSON_EXISTS(mj.molecule_data, '$.atoms[*]?(@.element == "cl")') THEN 'Contains Chlorine'
        ELSE 'No Chlorine'
    END AS contains_cl,
    bh.bond_depth,
    bh.bond_path
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON TO_CHAR(c.bond_id) = TO_CHAR(b.bond_id)
LEFT JOIN atom_stats stats ON m.molecule_id = stats.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_json mj ON m.molecule_id = mj.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON TO_CHAR(b.bond_id) = TO_CHAR(bh.bond_id)
WHERE 
    (m.label IS NOT NULL OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM atom a2 
        WHERE a2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
        GROUP BY a2.molecule_id 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
    ))
    AND c.atom_id2 IN (
        SELECT a3.atom_id 
        FROM atom a3 
        WHERE TO_CHAR(a3.element) = DECODE(TO_CHAR(a.element), 'cl', 'cl', 'h', 'o', 'o', 'h', TO_CHAR(a.element))
    )
ORDER BY 
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    b.bond_id

WITH match_dates AS (
  SELECT 
    "id",
    "date" AS match_date,
    TO_CHAR("date", 'fxDay', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=English') AS day_of_week,
    "date" AS match_start_time,
    "date" + INTERVAL '2' HOUR AS match_end_time,
    TRUNC("date") AS match_date_only
  FROM "Match"
)
SELECT 
  m.*,
  ROUND(
    GREATEST(
      LEAST(m.match_end_time, m.match_date_only + INTERVAL '17' HOUR) - 
      GREATEST(m.match_start_time, m.match_date_only + INTERVAL '7' HOUR + INTERVAL '30' MINUTE),
      0
    ) * 24 * 60
  ) AS match_duration_minutes
FROM match_dates m
WHERE TO_CHAR(m.match_date, 'D') BETWEEN '2' AND '6'

WITH "t" AS
  (SELECT 1 AS "from_hour",
          4 AS "to_hour",
          20 AS "pay"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS "from_hour",
                    8 AS "to_hour",
                    50 AS "pay"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS "from_hour",
                    12 AS "to_hour",
                    100 AS "pay"
   FROM dual),
     "input_data" AS
  (SELECT 6 AS "user_hours"
   FROM dual)
SELECT "i"."user_hours",
       SUM((LEAST("t"."to_hour", "i"."user_hours") - ("t"."from_hour" - 1)) * "t"."pay") AS "sum_to_pay"
FROM "input_data" "i"
CROSS JOIN "t"
WHERE "i"."user_hours" >= "t"."from_hour"
GROUP BY "i"."user_hours"

SELECT m.molecule_id,
       MIN(a.atom_id) AS first_atom_id
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
ORDER BY m.molecule_id
WHERE a."element" = 'cl'

WITH match_results AS (
  SELECT 
    home_team_api_id AS team_api_id,
    date AS match_date,
    CASE 
      WHEN home_team_goal > away_team_goal THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_win
  FROM "Match"
  WHERE home_team_goal IS NOT NULL 
    AND away_team_goal IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    away_team_api_id AS team_api_id,
    date AS match_date,
    CASE 
      WHEN away_team_goal > home_team_goal THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_win
  FROM "Match"
  WHERE home_team_goal IS NOT NULL 
    AND away_team_goal IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  team_api_id,
  start_date,
  end_date,
  match_count
FROM match_results
MATCH_RECOGNIZE (
  PARTITION BY team_api_id
  ORDER BY match_date
  MEASURES 
    FIRST(match_date) AS start_date,
    LAST(match_date) AS end_date,
    COUNT(*) AS match_count
  ONE ROW PER MATCH
  PATTERN (consecutive_wins{2,})
  DEFINE consecutive_wins AS is_win = 1
)
WHERE match_count >= 2
ORDER BY team_api_id, start_date

SELECT REPLACE("date", '.', '', 1, 1) AS "updated_value"
FROM "Team_Attributes"
WHERE "date" LIKE '%.%'

SELECT DISTINCT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY m.molecule_id, a.atom_id, b.bond_id

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
           MIN(a."element") AS first_element
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
)
SELECT m."molecule_id",
       ms.atom_count,
       CASE
           WHEN ms.atom_count > 0 THEN
               LISTAGG(a."atom_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id")
           ELSE 'No atoms'
       END AS atom_ids
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
WHERE (ms.first_element IS NULL OR ms.first_element != 'h')
GROUP BY m."molecule_id", ms.atom_count
ORDER BY ms.atom_count DESC NULLS LAST

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        COUNT(*) AS atom_count,
        MIN(element) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY atom_id) AS first_element,
        MAX(element) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY atom_id) AS last_element
    FROM "atom"
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
ranked_atoms AS (
    SELECT
        a."atom_id",
        a."molecule_id",
        a."element",
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
        stats.atom_count,
        stats.first_element,
        stats.last_element
    FROM "atom" a
    JOIN atom_stats stats ON a."molecule_id" = stats.molecule_id
),
filtered_atoms AS (
    SELECT
        ra.*,
        CASE
            WHEN ra.atom_rank <= 2 THEN 'TOP'
            WHEN ra.atom_rank > ra.atom_count - 2 THEN 'BOTTOM'
            ELSE 'MIDDLE'
        END AS position,
        LAG(ra."element") OVER (PARTITION BY ra."molecule_id" ORDER BY ra."atom_id") AS prev_element,
        LEAD(ra."element") OVER (PARTITION BY ra."molecule_id" ORDER BY ra."atom_id") AS next_element
    FROM ranked_atoms ra
)
SELECT
    fa."atom_id",
    fa."molecule_id",
    fa."element",
    fa.atom_rank AS rnk,
    fa.position,
    fa.prev_element,
    fa.next_element,
    fa.first_element,
    fa.last_element
FROM filtered_atoms fa
WHERE fa.atom_rank <= 2
ORDER BY fa."molecule_id", fa.atom_rank

SELECT "id",
       "date" AS "date_part"
FROM "Team_Attributes"

WITH ordered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "id",
    "team_api_id",
    "date",
    "buildUpPlaySpeed",
    LAG("buildUpPlaySpeed") OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS prev_value,
    LEAD("buildUpPlaySpeed") OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS next_value,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS row_num
  FROM "Team_Attributes"
),
changes AS (
  SELECT
    "id",
    "team_api_id",
    "date",
    prev_value AS old_value,
    "buildUpPlaySpeed" AS new_value,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS level
  FROM ordered_data
  WHERE prev_value IS NOT NULL 
    AND prev_value != "buildUpPlaySpeed"
)
SELECT 
  "id",
  "date",
  old_value,
  level,
  new_value
FROM changes
ORDER BY "team_api_id", "date", level

SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE('1110.400000.8001382', '\.[^.]*$', '') AS "output"
FROM DUAL

WITH month_generator AS (
    SELECT
        ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE('01/01/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY'), LEVEL - 1) AS month_start_date,
        LEVEL AS month_num
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12
),
molecule_months AS (
    SELECT
        mg.month_start_date,
        mg.month_num,
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label
    FROM month_generator mg
    CROSS JOIN molecule m
)
SELECT
    mm.month_start_date,
    mm.molecule_id,
    mm.label
FROM molecule_months mm
WHERE mm.month_start_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('01/01/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY')
                              AND TO_DATE('12/31/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY')
ORDER BY
    mm.month_start_date,
    mm.molecule_id

WITH "my_table" AS
  (SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
          1 AS "nif",
          'A1' AS "file_",
          5 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 1, 'A2', 3 FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A3', 2 FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A4', 1 FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B1', 4 FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B2', 6 FROM dual),
"first_match" AS
  (SELECT "cto",
          "nif",
          "file_",
          "filesize",
          "rn",
          "nif_size",
          "mn",
          "total_size"
   FROM
     (SELECT t.*,
             ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto"
                                ORDER BY SUBSTR("file_", 1, 1), TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("file_", 2))) AS "rn",
             SUM("filesize") OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "nif") AS "nif_size"
      FROM "my_table" t) MATCH_RECOGNIZE(PARTITION BY "cto"
                                         ORDER BY "rn" MEASURES MATCH_NUMBER() AS "mn",
                                         SUM("filesize") AS "total_size" ALL ROWS PER MATCH PATTERN ((same_nif | nif)* end_nif) DEFINE same_nif AS "nif" = NEXT("nif"),
                                         nif AS ("nif" != NEXT("nif")
                                                 AND SUM("filesize") + NEXT("nif_size") <= 10),
                                         end_nif AS SUM("filesize") <= 10))
SELECT "cto",
       "nif",
       "file_",
       "partition",
       "mn" - "first_mn" + 1 AS "subpartition",
       "total_size"
FROM "first_match" MATCH_RECOGNIZE(PARTITION BY "cto"
                                   ORDER BY "rn" MEASURES MATCH_NUMBER() AS "partition",
                                   FIRST("mn") AS "first_mn" ALL ROWS PER MATCH PATTERN ((same_mn | diff_mn)+) DEFINE same_mn AS "mn" = PREV("mn"),
                                   diff_mn AS ("mn" != PREV("mn")
                                               AND "mn" - FIRST("mn") < 7))

WITH tbl AS
  (SELECT TO_DATE('12.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS act_date
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('31.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('13.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('27.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.04.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual),
     t2 AS
  (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS act_month,
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS rn_2
   FROM tbl t
   GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
            TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')),
     grid AS
  (SELECT t1.activation_month,
          t1.rn_1,
          t2.act_month,
          t2.rn_2
   FROM
     (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS activation_month,
             TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS rn_1
      FROM tbl t
      GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
               TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')) t1
   LEFT JOIN t2 ON (t1.rn_1 <= t2.rn_2)),
     molecule_activity AS
  (SELECT m."molecule_id",
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS act_date
   FROM tbl t
   CROSS JOIN "molecule" m
   WHERE m."molecule_id" IN
     (SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id"
      FROM "bond"
      UNION SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id"
      FROM "atom"))
SELECT g.activation_month,
       g.rn_1,
       g.act_month,
       g.rn_2,
       COUNT(DISTINCT ma."molecule_id") AS active_molecules
FROM grid g
LEFT JOIN molecule_activity ma ON 
    (g.rn_1 = g.rn_2 AND ma.act_date = g.rn_1)
    OR (g.rn_1 < g.rn_2 AND ma.act_date BETWEEN g.rn_1 AND g.rn_2)
GROUP BY g.activation_month,
         g.rn_1,
         g.act_month,
         g.rn_2
ORDER BY g.rn_1,
         g.rn_2

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        12 AS "ARTCRED",
        7.5 AS "BIZCRED",
        12 AS "HUMCRED",
        14 AS "NATCRED",
        11 AS "TEKCRED",
        9 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        15 AS "ARTCRED",
        9 AS "BIZCRED",
        14 AS "HUMCRED",
        16 AS "NATCRED",
        13 AS "TEKCRED",
        11 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        10.5 AS "ARTCRED",
        6 AS "BIZCRED",
        5 AS "HUMCRED",
        4 AS "NATCRED",
        6 AS "TEKCRED",
        3 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'BIZ' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'NAT' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"latest_credits" AS (
    SELECT
        C."ID",
        C."ARTCRED",
        C."BIZCRED",
        C."HUMCRED",
        C."NATCRED",
        C."TEKCRED",
        C."GENCRED",
        C."EFFECTIVE_DATE",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY C."ID", G."DATECHOICE" ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC) AS RN
    FROM "credits" C
    CROSS JOIN "grp_choices" G
    WHERE C."ID" = G."ID" AND C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" <= G."DATECHOICE"
)

SELECT
    G."ID",
    G."GROUPCHOICE",
    CASE
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'ART' THEN LC."ARTCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'BIZ' THEN LC."BIZCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'HUM' THEN LC."HUMCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'NAT' THEN LC."NATCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'TEK' THEN LC."TEKCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'GEN' THEN LC."GENCRED"
        ELSE 0
    END AS "TOTAL_CREDITS"
FROM "grp_choices" G
JOIN "latest_credits" LC ON G."ID" = LC."ID" AND G."DATECHOICE" = LC."DATECHOICE" AND LC.RN = 1
ORDER BY G."ID", G."GROUPCHOICE"

WITH molecule_atoms AS
  (SELECT "molecule_id",
          COUNT("atom_id") AS atom_count
   FROM "atom"
   GROUP BY "molecule_id")
SELECT "molecule_id",
       level AS atom_number
FROM molecule_atoms 
CONNECT BY level <= atom_count
AND PRIOR "molecule_id" = "molecule_id"
AND PRIOR sys_guid() IS NOT NULL

SELECT "team_api_id",
       "buildUpPlaySpeed",
       "date"
FROM
  (SELECT "team_api_id",
          "buildUpPlaySpeed",
          "date",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id"
                             ORDER BY "date" DESC) AS seq
   FROM "Team_Attributes")
WHERE seq = 1

WITH player_data AS (
    SELECT
        p.player_api_id AS player_id,
        p.player_name AS name,
        pa.overall_rating AS rating,
        pa.preferred_foot AS preferred_foot,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY p.player_api_id 
            ORDER BY pa.date DESC NULLS LAST, pa.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM Player p
    LEFT JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_api_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    player_id,
    name,
    TO_CHAR(rating) AS rating,
    preferred_foot
FROM player_data
WHERE rn = 1
    AND rating IS NOT NULL
    AND preferred_foot IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY rating DESC NULLS LAST
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

WITH match_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."date" AS "match_date",
        "l"."name" AS "league_name",
        "c"."name" AS "country_name",
        "ht"."team_long_name" AS "home_team",
        "at"."team_long_name" AS "away_team",
        "m"."home_team_goal" AS "home_team_goals",
        "m"."away_team_goal" AS "away_team_goals",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "m"."league_id", "m"."season"
                     ORDER BY "m"."home_team_goal" + "m"."away_team_goal" DESC) AS "high_scoring_rank"
    FROM "Match" "m"
    INNER JOIN "League" "l" ON "m"."league_id" = "l"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Country" "c" ON "m"."country_id" = "c"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "ht" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ht"."team_api_id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "at" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "at"."team_api_id"
),
team_performance AS (
    SELECT
        "team_long_name",
        COUNT(*) AS "total_matches",
        SUM(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "goals_scored",
        AVG(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "avg_goals_per_match"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "home_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "away_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
    )
    GROUP BY "team_long_name"
)
SELECT
    ms."match_date",
    ms."league_name",
    ms."country_name",
    ms."home_team",
    ms."away_team",
    ms."home_team_goals",
    ms."away_team_goals",
    ms."high_scoring_rank",
    htp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "home_team_avg_goals",
    atp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "away_team_avg_goals"
FROM match_stats ms
LEFT JOIN team_performance htp ON ms."home_team" = htp."team_long_name"
LEFT JOIN team_performance atp ON ms."away_team" = atp."team_long_name"
WHERE ms."high_scoring_rank" <= 10
ORDER BY ms."match_date" DESC

WITH "MY_TABLE" AS
  (SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'DUMMY' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL),
     "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" AS
  (SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
          1 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'NOTIONALDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    1 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    3 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL),
     "CTE" AS
  (SELECT X."TECHNICAL_ID",
          X."ASSET_TYPE",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY X."TECHNICAL_ID"
                             ORDER BY MRAT."PRIORITY") AS "rn"
   FROM "MY_TABLE" X
   INNER JOIN "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" MRAT ON X."ASSET_TYPE" = MRAT."ASSET_TYPE"
   WHERE MRAT."APPLICATION" = 'SW')
SELECT "TECHNICAL_ID",
       "ASSET_TYPE"
FROM "CTE"
WHERE "rn" = 1

WITH match_dates AS (
    SELECT m."country_id",
           m."date",
           m."league_id",
           m."season",
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."country_id" ORDER BY m."date" DESC) AS match_rank
    FROM "Match" m
    WHERE m."date" IS NOT NULL
),
country_stats AS (
    SELECT c."id" AS country_id,
           c."name" AS country_name,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."league_id") AS league_count,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."season") AS season_count
    FROM "Country" c
    LEFT JOIN "Match" m ON c."id" = m."country_id"
    GROUP BY c."id", c."name"
),
match_summary AS (
    SELECT md."country_id",
           md."date",
           md.match_rank,
           LISTAGG(l."name", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY l."name") AS leagues_played
    FROM match_dates md
    JOIN "League" l ON md."league_id" = l."id"
    WHERE md.match_rank <= 2
    GROUP BY md."country_id", md."date", md.match_rank
)
SELECT cs.country_id,
       cs.country_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) AS last_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS last_match_leagues,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms."date" END) AS prev_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS prev_match_leagues,
       cs.league_count,
       cs.season_count
FROM country_stats cs
LEFT JOIN match_summary ms ON cs.country_id = ms."country_id"
GROUP BY cs.country_id, cs.country_name, cs.league_count, cs.season_count
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) DESC

SELECT a.atom_id,
       a.molecule_id,
       a.element,
       c.bond_id,
       CASE
           WHEN b.bond_type IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
           ELSE b.bond_type
       END AS bond_type
FROM "atom" a
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "molecule" m
    WHERE m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    AND m.label IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY a.atom_id

SELECT team_api_id,
       match_id,
       home_team_api_id,
       away_team_api_id,
       home_team_goal,
       away_team_goal,
       SUM(goal_diff) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY match_id) AS cumulative_goal_difference
FROM (
    SELECT "t"."team_api_id",
           "m"."id" AS match_id,
           "m"."home_team_api_id",
           "m"."away_team_api_id",
           "m"."home_team_goal",
           "m"."away_team_goal",
           CASE 
               WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" 
               THEN "m"."home_team_goal" - "m"."away_team_goal"
               ELSE "m"."away_team_goal" - "m"."home_team_goal"
           END AS goal_diff
    FROM "Match" "m"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "t" 
        ON ("m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" 
            OR "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id")
    WHERE TRUNC("m"."date") = TO_DATE('2008-11-22', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
)
ORDER BY team_api_id, match_id

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(a.atom_id) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        bond_id,
        molecule_id,
        bond_type,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 1) AS molecule_prefix,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) AS first_atom_num,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) AS second_atom_num
    FROM bond
),
molecule_connectivity AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.atom_id) AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS bond_count,
        CASE
            WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Positive'
            WHEN m.label = '-' THEN 'Negative'
            ELSE 'Neutral'
        END AS charge_type
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    ast.atom_count,
    ast.elements,
    bh.first_atom_num + bh.second_atom_num AS atom_sum,
    mc.connected_atoms,
    mc.charge_type,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_type) AS bond_type_rank
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom_stats ast ON m.molecule_id = ast.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON b.bond_id = bh.bond_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_connectivity mc ON m.molecule_id = mc.molecule_id
WHERE a.element IN (SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id LIKE 'TR%')
  AND b.bond_type IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    atom_rank,
    bh.first_atom_num

SELECT T."team_long_name",
       T."team_short_name",
       TA."buildUpPlaySpeed",
       TA."buildUpPlaySpeedClass",
       TA."chanceCreationShooting",
       TA."chanceCreationShootingClass",
       TA."defencePressure",
       TA."defencePressureClass"
FROM "Team" T
INNER JOIN "Team_Attributes" TA ON T."team_api_id" = TA."team_api_id"
WHERE TA."date" = TO_DATE('2013-09-20', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT "valid_from",
       "valid_until",
       "count"
FROM
  (SELECT "dt" AS "valid_from",
          LEAD("dt") OVER (ORDER BY "dt") - INTERVAL '1' SECOND AS "valid_until",
          SUM("count" * "type") OVER (ORDER BY "dt") AS "count"
   FROM
     (SELECT "valid_from" AS "dt",
             1 AS "type",
             1 AS "count"
      FROM
        (SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM "schools"
         WHERE ROWNUM = 1
         UNION ALL 
         SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-02-28', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM "schools"
         WHERE ROWNUM = 1)
      UNION ALL
      SELECT "valid_until" + INTERVAL '1' DAY AS "dt",
             -1 AS "type",
             1 AS "count"
      FROM
        (SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM "schools"
         WHERE ROWNUM = 1
         UNION ALL 
         SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-02-28', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM "schools"
         WHERE ROWNUM = 1)))
WHERE "count" > 0
  AND ("valid_from" <= "valid_until" OR "valid_until" IS NULL)

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."atom_id",
       "a"."element",
       "c"."atom_id2",
       "b"."bond_id",
       "b"."bond_type"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id",
         "c"."atom_id2"

WITH school_data AS (
  SELECT
    s."CDSCode" AS "pk",
    CASE
      WHEN s."Charter" = 1 THEN 'Charter'
      WHEN s."Magnet" = 1 THEN 'Magnet'
      ELSE 'Regular'
    END AS "col2",
    SUBSTR(s."County", 1, INSTR(s."County", ' ') - 1) AS "col3",
    TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(s."LastUpdate", 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ' ||
           LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM, 24), 2, '0') || ':' ||
           LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM * 7, 60), 2, '0'),
           'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS "col4"
  FROM "schools" s
  WHERE s."StatusType" = 'Active'
    AND s."LastUpdate" IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_data AS (
  SELECT
    sd."pk",
    sd."col2",
    sd."col3",
    sd."col4"
  FROM school_data sd
  WHERE sd."col4" >= TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:00', 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')
    AND sd."col4" < TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:05', 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')
),
aggregated_data AS (
  SELECT
    fd."col2",
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT fd."col3", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fd."col3") AS "col3_list"
  FROM filtered_data fd
  GROUP BY fd."col2"
)
SELECT
  ad."col2",
  ad."col3_list" AS "col3",
  COUNT(fd."pk") AS "record_count"
FROM aggregated_data ad
LEFT JOIN filtered_data fd ON fd."col2" = ad."col2"
GROUP BY ad."col2", ad."col3_list"
ORDER BY "record_count" DESC

SELECT molecule.molecule_id,
       molecule.label,
       atom.atom_id,
       atom.element,
       bond.bond_id,
       bond.bond_type,
       connected.atom_id2
FROM molecule
INNER JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected ON atom.atom_id = connected.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond ON connected.bond_id = bond.bond_id
ORDER BY molecule.molecule_id,
         atom.atom_id,
         connected.atom_id2,
         bond.bond_type

WITH atom_elements AS (
    SELECT
        a.atom_id,
        a.molecule_id,
        a.element,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY a.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS element_rank
    FROM atom a
),
bond_details AS (
    SELECT
        b.bond_id,
        b.molecule_id,
        b.bond_type,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY b.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_id) AS bond_rank
    FROM bond b
),
molecule_connections AS (
    SELECT
        c.atom_id,
        c.atom_id2,
        c.bond_id
    FROM connected c
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    ae.atom_id,
    ae.element,
    bd.bond_id,
    bd.bond_type
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom_elements ae ON m.molecule_id = ae.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_connections mc ON ae.atom_id = mc.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond_details bd ON mc.bond_id = bd.bond_id
WHERE ae.element_rank <= 10
  AND bd.bond_rank <= 5
  AND (m.label IS NULL OR m.label IN ('+', '-'))
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    ae.atom_id,
    bd.bond_id

SELECT m."molecule_id",
       COUNT(a."atom_id") / COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS result
FROM "molecule" m
INNER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
GROUP BY m."molecule_id"

WITH atom_counts AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atom_count
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT
        b.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM bond b
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id AS ID,
    COALESCE(ac.atom_count, 0) AS QTY,
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS VALUE
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom_counts ac ON m.molecule_id = ac.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc ON m.molecule_id = bc.molecule_id

WITH atom_data AS (
    SELECT
        a.atom_id,
        a.molecule_id,
        CASE
            WHEN a.element = 'cl' THEN UPPER(a.element)
            ELSE a.element
        END AS element
    FROM atom a
),
bond_data AS (
    SELECT
        b.bond_id,
        b.molecule_id,
        CASE
            WHEN b.bond_type = '-' THEN 'single'
            WHEN b.bond_type = '=' THEN 'double'
            WHEN b.bond_type = '#' THEN 'triple'
            ELSE b.bond_type
        END AS bond_type
    FROM bond b
),
molecule_elements AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS elements
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom_data a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(a.atom_id, b.bond_id) AS "id",
    COALESCE(a.molecule_id, b.molecule_id) AS "molecule_id",
    COALESCE(a.element, b.bond_type) AS "val",
    me.elements AS molecule_composition
FROM atom_data a
FULL OUTER JOIN bond_data b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_elements me ON COALESCE(a.molecule_id, b.molecule_id) = me.molecule_id
WHERE (a.atom_id IS NOT NULL OR b.bond_id IS NOT NULL)
  AND (
      me.elements LIKE '%cl%'
      OR me.elements IS NULL
      OR REGEXP_LIKE(COALESCE(a.element, b.bond_type), '^[a-z]+$')
  )
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN a.atom_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 2
    END,
    "id",
    "molecule_id"

WITH "data" AS
  (SELECT 101 AS "id",
          'A' AS "type",
          10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    20 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'C' AS "type",
                    30 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 102 AS "id",
                    'A' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 102 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 103 AS "id",
                    'A' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 103 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual),
     "w_cnt" AS
  (SELECT "id",
          "part",
          COUNT(*) AS "cnt"
   FROM "data"
   WHERE "type" = 'B'
   GROUP BY "id",
            "part"
   HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT d."id",
       d."type",
       d."part"
FROM "data" d
INNER JOIN "w_cnt" w ON d."id" = w."id"
AND d."part" = w."part"
WHERE d."type" = 'B'

WITH RECURSIVE molecule_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        a.atom_id,
        CAST(a.element AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS element,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS atom_id2,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_id,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_type,
        1 AS level,
        CAST(a.atom_id AS NVARCHAR2(4000)) AS path
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        h.molecule_id,
        h.label,
        h.atom_id,
        h.element,
        c.atom_id2,
        c.bond_id,
        CAST(b.bond_type AS NVARCHAR2(512)),
        h.level + 1,
        h.path || '->' || c.atom_id2
    FROM molecule_hierarchy h
    JOIN connected c ON h.atom_id = c.atom_id
    LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE h.level < 3
    AND INSTR(h.path, c.atom_id2) = 0
),
pivoted_elements AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 1, element)) AS element1,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 2, element)) AS element2,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 3, element)) AS element3
    FROM (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            CAST(element AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS element,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY atom_id) AS rn
        FROM atom
    )
    GROUP BY molecule_id
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    CAST(m.label AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS label,
    a.atom_id,
    JSON_OBJECT(
        'element' VALUE CAST(a.element AS NVARCHAR2(512)),
        'connected_atoms' VALUE (
            SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                JSON_OBJECT(
                    'atom_id' VALUE c.atom_id2,
                    'bond_type' VALUE CAST(b.bond_type AS NVARCHAR2(512))
                )
                ORDER BY c.atom_id2
            )
            FROM connected c
            LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
            WHERE c.atom_id = a.atom_id
        )
    ) AS atom_details,
    c.atom_id2,
    b.bond_id,
    CAST(b.bond_type AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_type,
    pe.element1,
    pe.element2,
    pe.element3,
    LISTAGG(CAST(a.element AS NVARCHAR2(512)), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id) AS elements_list
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND m.molecule_id = SUBSTR(b.bond_id, 1, INSTR(b.bond_id, '_') - 1)
LEFT JOIN pivoted_elements pe ON m.molecule_id = pe.molecule_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
    WHERE mh.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    AND mh.level > 1
)
ORDER BY m.molecule_id, a.atom_id, c.atom_id2

WITH "columns" ("column_name") AS
  (SELECT 'CDSCode'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'StatusType'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'School'
   FROM dual),
     "column_exists" ("column_name",
                      "column_exists") AS
  (SELECT c."column_name",
          NVL2(a."column_name", 'YES', 'NO')
   FROM "columns" c
   LEFT OUTER JOIN all_tab_columns a ON (a.table_name = 'SCHOOLS'
                                         AND c."column_name" = a."column_name")
   WHERE c."column_name" = 'CDSCode')
SELECT *
FROM "column_exists" PIVOT (MAX("column_exists")
                            FOR "column_name" IN ('CDSCode' AS "cdscode"))

WITH replacements (molecule_id, label, spos) AS
  (SELECT molecule_id,
          label,
          INSTR(label, '+')
   FROM molecule
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT molecule_id,
                    SUBSTR(label, 1, spos - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR(label, spos + 1),
                    INSTR(SUBSTR(label, 1, spos - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR(label, spos + 1), '+')
   FROM replacements
   WHERE spos > 0)
SELECT molecule_id,
       label
FROM replacements
WHERE spos = 0

WITH "a" ("test") AS
  (SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|Address at some where|details' FROM dual
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|' FROM dual
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16' FROM dual)
SELECT "test",
       REGEXP_REPLACE("test", '^(([^|]*\|){4}[^|]*)\|.*$', '\1') AS "res"
FROM "a"

SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    c."bond_id",
    b."bond_type"
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
ORDER BY
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    c."bond_id"

WITH molecule_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(pair_str, ',') > 0
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(pair_str, 1, INSTR(pair_str, ',') - 1))
            ELSE pair_str
        END AS mol_id1,
        CASE
            WHEN INSTR(pair_str, ',') > 0
            THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(pair_str, INSTR(pair_str, ',') + 1))
            ELSE NULL
        END AS mol_id2
    FROM (
        SELECT 'TR427, TR430' AS pair_str FROM DUAL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'TR427, TR431' FROM DUAL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'TR430, TR431' FROM DUAL
    )
),
molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label",
        COUNT(a."atom_id") OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY a."element")
            OVER(PARTITION BY m."molecule_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON m."molecule_id" = b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT
    m1."molecule_id" AS molecule_id1,
    m1."label" AS label1,
    m1.atom_count,
    m1.elements,
    m2."molecule_id" AS molecule_id2,
    m2."label" AS label2,
    m2.atom_count,
    m2.elements,
    CASE
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0 AND m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Both have bonds'
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Only ' || m1."molecule_id" || ' has bonds'
        WHEN m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Only ' || m2."molecule_id" || ' has bonds'
        ELSE 'Neither has bonds'
    END AS bond_status
FROM molecule_stats m1
JOIN molecule_pairs mp ON m1."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id1
JOIN molecule_stats m2 ON m2."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id2
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "connected" c1
    JOIN "connected" c2 ON c1."bond_id" = c2."bond_id"
    WHERE c1."atom_id" LIKE m1."molecule_id" || '%'
    AND c2."atom_id" LIKE m2."molecule_id" || '%'
)
ORDER BY
    m1."molecule_id",
    m2."molecule_id"

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."atom_id",
       "a"."element",
       "b"."bond_id",
       "b"."bond_type",
       "c"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id",
         DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("b"."bond_type", 4000, 1)

WITH string1_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('24,36,78,98', '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) AS value,
           LEVEL AS position
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH('24,36,78,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('24,36,78,98', ',')) + 1
),
string2_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('25,36,88,98', '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) AS value,
           LEVEL AS position
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH('25,36,88,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('25,36,88,98', ',')) + 1
),
string1_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string1_tab
),
string2_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string2_tab
),
common_values AS (
    SELECT s1.num_value
    FROM string1_parsed s1
    JOIN string2_parsed s2 ON s1.num_value = s2.num_value
)
SELECT LISTAGG(num_value, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY num_value) AS common_values
FROM common_values
WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL

WITH t AS
  (SELECT "date",
          "match_api_id" AS code,
          TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date") AS duration,
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id", TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) AS cnt,
          MIN(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id") AS min_dur
   FROM "Match")
SELECT t."date",
       t.code,
       t.duration,
       CASE
           WHEN t.min_dur = 0
                OR MAX(t.cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY t."date", t.code) > 1 THEN 'Y'
           ELSE 'N'
       END AS flg
FROM t
WHERE TRUNC(t."date") = TO_DATE('2008-11-22', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."element"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id"

SELECT b."bond_id",
       b."molecule_id",
       b."bond_type",
       m.months,
       GREATEST(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), m.months), SYSDATE) AS bond_formation_date
FROM "bond" b
CROSS JOIN
  (SELECT LEVEL AS months
   FROM dual 
   CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5) m
WHERE b."molecule_id" = 'TR011'

SELECT JSON_OBJECT(
    KEY 'country_' || "country_id" 
    VALUE JSON_ARRAYAGG(
        JSON_OBJECT(
            KEY 'date' VALUE "date",
            KEY 'home_team_goal' VALUE "home_team_goal",
            KEY 'away_team_goal' VALUE "away_team_goal"
            RETURNING CLOB
        )
        RETURNING CLOB
    )
    RETURNING CLOB
) AS JSON_OUTPUT
FROM "Match"
WHERE "country_id" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "country_id"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(DISTINCT a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."element") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
molecule_pivot AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            m."molecule_id",
            a."element",
            COUNT(*) AS element_count
        FROM "molecule" m
        JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
        GROUP BY m."molecule_id", a."element"
    )
    PIVOT (
        SUM(element_count)
        FOR element IN ('cl' AS chlorine, 'c' AS carbon, 'h' AS hydrogen, 'o' AS oxygen, 'n' AS nitrogen)
    )
)
SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    b."bond_id",
    b."bond_type",
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ms.elements,
    mp.chlorine,
    mp.carbon,
    mp.hydrogen,
    mp.oxygen,
    mp.nitrogen,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY b."bond_type") AS bond_type_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN a."element" = 'cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
        WHEN a."element" = 'c' THEN 'Carbon'
        WHEN a."element" = 'h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'o' THEN 'Oxygen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
        ELSE a."element"
    END AS element_name
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_pivot mp ON m."molecule_id" = mp."molecule_id"
ORDER BY
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    b."bond_id"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
           LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
bond_stats AS (
    SELECT b."molecule_id",
           COUNT(b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "bond" b
    GROUP BY b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT ms."molecule_id",
       ms.atom_count AS "total_atoms",
       bs.bond_count,
       CASE
           WHEN ms.atom_count > 0 THEN
               ROUND(bs.bond_count / ms.atom_count, 2)
           ELSE 0
       END AS bonds_per_atom,
       ms.elements
FROM molecule_stats ms
LEFT JOIN bond_stats bs ON ms."molecule_id" = bs."molecule_id"
WHERE ms.elements LIKE '%cl%'
  AND ms.atom_count > 0
ORDER BY ms."molecule_id"

WITH team_speed_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "team_api_id",
        "date",
        "buildUpPlaySpeed",
        "buildUpPlaySpeedClass",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date" DESC) as rn
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
),
class_averages AS (
    SELECT
        "buildUpPlaySpeedClass",
        AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed") as class_avg_speed
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
    WHERE "date" BETWEEN TO_DATE('2015-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2016-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    GROUP BY "buildUpPlaySpeedClass"
),
match_details AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."id",
        "m"."date",
        "m"."home_team_api_id",
        "m"."away_team_api_id",
        "m"."home_team_goal",
        "m"."away_team_goal",
        "t"."team_long_name" as home_team_name,
        "t2"."team_long_name" as away_team_name,
        "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" as home_speed,
        "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeedClass" as home_speed_class,
        "ta_away"."buildUpPlaySpeed" as away_speed,
        "ca"."class_avg_speed",
        (SELECT AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed") FROM "Team_Attributes") as overall_avg_speed
    FROM "Match" "m"
    JOIN "Team" "t" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
    JOIN "Team" "t2" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t2"."team_api_id"
    JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ta"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta"."date" <= "m"."date"
    LEFT JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta_away" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "ta_away"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta_away"."date" <= "m"."date"
    LEFT JOIN class_averages "ca" ON "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeedClass" = "ca"."buildUpPlaySpeedClass"
    WHERE "m"."date" BETWEEN TO_DATE('2015-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2016-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        AND "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    "id",
    "date",
    "home_team_api_id",
    "away_team_api_id",
    "home_team_goal",
    "away_team_goal",
    "home_team_name",
    "away_team_name",
    "home_speed",
    "home_speed_class",
    "away_speed",
    CASE
        WHEN "home_speed" > "class_avg_speed" THEN 'Above Class Average'
        ELSE 'Below Class Average'
    END as speed_comparison
FROM match_details
WHERE "home_speed" > "overall_avg_speed"
ORDER BY "home_team_goal" DESC, "away_team_goal" ASC

WITH lose_agg AS
  (SELECT "team_api_id",
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "date") = 2011 THEN "defencePressure"
              END) AS lose_5,
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "date") = 2012 THEN "defencePressure"
              END) AS lose_10
   FROM "Team_Attributes"
   GROUP BY "team_api_id"),
     profit_agg AS
  (SELECT "team_api_id",
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "date") = 2011 THEN "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              END) AS profit_5,
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "date") = 2012 THEN "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              END) AS profit_10
   FROM "Team_Attributes"
   GROUP BY "team_api_id")
SELECT l.lose_5,
       p.profit_5,
       l.lose_10,
       p.profit_10,
       COALESCE(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id") AS "team_api_id"
FROM lose_agg l
FULL OUTER JOIN profit_agg p ON l."team_api_id" = p."team_api_id"
ORDER BY COALESCE(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id")
